Like with Land's two beam color theory: two light sources are all that's needed, to create within the outcome all the colors (permutations and changes, possibilities) there are. The mirror opposite universe. It is not --repeat NOT-- another universe, but this one reflected. Thus as Parmenides said, Form Two is actually Form One (reflected, or seen in reverse, or seen backward or upside down or from outside). We have universe and -- "as seen by reflection in the bottom of a polished pan.) The most important realization of Parmenides: Yin is (or becomes) Yang. There must be a zone of interaction between Form One and Two giving rise to change and time. We should do as Parm

However, against this is set my experience of anamnesis, the neoplatonistic recovery of memory of divinity already there. I did not acquire it abruptly; I recalled it.

In reconciling this with Christianity, I was restored. To the former state I had lost (the myth of Adam, the Fall). In the Parousia, there is the Restoration of all things, specifically, man is restored to his intended, divine state. The Second Birth (born again or saved, found after having been lost)

Jesus: "Do this in memory of me." (The communion.) This is what is called "Anamnesis." It is also anamnesis which I experienced (in Plato's sense.) But I experienced Christian anamnesis, which is both what the euchrist does, and what Christ asked of us: in memory. And thus I came to acquire memory -- of 45 AD specifially.
